prompt.content:
For promotions effective January 1, 2025, identify all fast-track promotions based on the defined guideline for minimum tenure required for promotion (attached). Using the salary data from Employee Roster_Enhanced.xlsx (assume these salaries are applicable for year 2025) and salary increments awarded at the time of promotions from Promotions_effective_1Jan2025.xlsx, calculate the total annual cost savings for 2025 under a scenario where fast-track promotions were not allowed and affected employees instead receive a standard 5% salary hike effective January 1, 2025.

Report the final answer (in USD) in a sheet rounded to one decimal place.

rubrics.name: States that the total annual cost savings for 2025 under a scenario where... (ver_ea53ddea2af8467c9e0c751b9f6ac16e)

messages.content: States that the total annual cost savings for 2025 under a scenario where fast-track promotions were not allowed and affected employees instead receive a standard 5% salary hike (effective January 1, 2025) is $105,026.4 (acceptable range $103,976.1 to $106,076.7).
